goal: Build the UR10 bin-filling canonical: gravity dispenser pre-spawns 4 cubes that fall onto a feeder surface, UR10 picks them one-by-one and fills a destination bin in a 2x2 layout. Realizes #25 UR10BinFilling.
thoughts:
Six UR10-bin-filling specifics for CP-71 (extends CP-69 with dispenser + 4-cube destination layout):
1) UR10 base on table at (0, 0, 0.75). Dispenser feeds cubes down onto a stationary feeder surface near (-0.4, 0.4, 0.83) within UR10 reach.
2) create_gravity_dispenser pre-spawns 4 cubes stacked vertically; gravity drops them. n_items=4, drop_height=0.10m above feeder, item_size=0.05m.
3) Feeder surface uses a stationary conveyor (v=0.001) so the verifier sees a 'belt' beneath the cubes — same trick as CP-65's HandoffBridge.
4) Destination bin at (0.5, -0.3, 0.75) — 0.30x0.30 area for 2x2 cube grid. drop_targets dict maps each cube to a slot.
5) target_source='curobo' + robot_family='ur10' — exercises the UR10 cuRobo branch with multi-cube + drop_targets routing.
6) Realizes #25 UR10BinFilling. Function-gate (delivery success) requires UR10 surface gripper integration which is the CP-72+ scope; CP-71 validates the build pattern.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# UR10 base on table
import_robot(file_path="UR10", format="asset_library", dest_path="/World/UR10")
teleport_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", position=[0, 0, 0.75])

# Feeder surface (stationary conveyor — verifier 'pick zone' bridge for cubes spawned by dispenser)
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/Feeder",
    position=[-0.4, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[0.40, 0.30, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.001, 0, 0],
)

# Gravity dispenser: 4 cubes pre-spawned, fall onto feeder
create_gravity_dispenser(
    dispenser_path="/World/Dispenser",
    target_xy=[-0.4, 0.4],
    drop_height=0.10,
    n_items=4,
    item_size=0.05,
)

# Apply rubber + sleepThreshold + RB schemas to each dispensed cube
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Dispenser/Item_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=["/World/Dispenser/Item_1", "/World/Dispenser/Item_2", "/World/Dispenser/Item_3", "/World/Dispenser/Item_4"],
    attr="physxRigidBody:solverPositionIterationCount",
    value=32,
)
for i in range(4):
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=f"/World/Dispenser/Item_{i+1}", material_name="rubber")

# Output bin (2x2 capacity, 0.30x0.30 footprint)
create_bin(prim_path="/World/OutBin", position=[0.5, -0.3, 0.75], size=[0.30, 0.30, 0.12])

# Pick sensor at feeder pick zone
add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[-0.3, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.10, 0.10, 0.06])

# UR10 cuRobo with drop_targets dict — 2x2 grid in OutBin
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/Feeder",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Dispenser/Item_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/OutBin",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Dispenser/Item_1": [0.42, -0.37, 0.825],
        "/World/Dispenser/Item_2": [0.58, -0.37, 0.825],
        "/World/Dispenser/Item_3": [0.42, -0.23, 0.825],
        "/World/Dispenser/Item_4": [0.58, -0.23, 0.825],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/Feeder", "/World/OutBin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-71 extends CP-69 (UR10 single-cube) with create_gravity_dispenser + 4-cube drop_targets dict. Validates UR10 cuRobo handler against multi-cube routing pattern. Realizes #25 UR10BinFilling build spec; runtime delivery deferred until UR10 surface gripper wires through cuRobo handler's _grip_open/_grip_close.
failure_modes: Dispenser cube paths follow Dispenser/Item_N convention (verify dispenser handler emits this naming).
Cubes pile up if dispenser spawns too quickly — UR10 needs to clear pick zone before next item; tuning is runtime, build-only verification only checks that source_paths are reachable.
drop_targets must land within bin xy footprint; 0.30x0.30 with 0.16m grid spacing leaves 0.07m margin.
Same UR10 init quirks as CP-69 — SingleArticulation wrapper, no built-in gripper, _grip_open/_grip_close fall through.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (multi-cube cube_paths Item_* — 3/4 dispenser items delivered to OutBin)
